goal: Starting with a stone pickaxe, mine exactly 8 stone, 10 coal ore, and 3 iron ore; find or make a crafting table; craft and place a furnace; smelt the 3 raw iron with coal; and craft an iron pickaxe.

goal_result.goal: Starting with a stone pickaxe, mine exactly 8 stone, 10 coal ore, and 3 iron ore; find or make a crafting table; craft and place a furnace; smelt the 3 raw iron with coal; and craft an iron pickaxe.
